name: EThOS - Epistemic and Temporal Hybrid Ontology Systems
description: Research group focused on developing hybrid ontology systems that combine epistemic and temporal reasoning for knowledge representation and multi-agent systems.

name: LUCI - Logic, Understanding, and Computational Intelligence
description: Interdisciplinary research group working on the intersection of logic, artificial intelligence, and cognitive science, with focus on computational models of understanding and reasoning.

name: SPIKE - Strategic Planning in Knowledge Engineering
description: Research group specializing in strategic planning algorithms and knowledge engineering approaches for autonomous systems and multi-agent environments.

name: KIDS - Knowledge, Intelligence, and Decision Systems
description: Research group focusing on knowledge-based systems, intelligent decision making, and the application of logic-based approaches to real-world problems.
